miwi        2009-12-13 00:25:59 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11-themes           Makefile 
  Added files:
    x11-themes/gtk-aurora-engine Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                 pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This is a GTK+ 2.x engine. The Aurora Gtk Engine themes all common Gtk
  widgets to provide an attractive, complete and consistent look for Gtk
  applications.
  
  WWW:    http://gnome-look.org/content/show.php?content=56438
  
  PR:             ports/141161
  Submitted by:   okeeblow <root at cooltrainer.org>
